title: American Express credit cards page renders blank white screen
description: On https://www.americanexpress.com/us/credit-cards/ the viewport shows a blank white page with no visible header, filters, or card results. Prior click on top navigation 'Cards' seemed to miss target and focus remained on body. Expected to see the credit cards listing page with filter controls and card tiles, but page content is not rendered.
expected_behavior: Credit cards listing page should render with header/navigation, filters (rewards/travel/cashback), and card results.
actual_behavior: Page appears completely blank white with no visible content or interactive elements.
steps_to_reproduce: Observe page area renders as blank white screen
